microsoft_ft: Owned the **product roadmap** for Azure's recovery validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, user-focused model aligned with modernization objectives.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model adopted across product teams.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, presenting outcomes to both technical and non-technical senior stakeholders.

Integrated an **AI agent** into drill planning workflows, restructuring the planning cycle to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating feasibility of intelligent automation for mission-critical product operations.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**, directly improving delivery velocity.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, resulting in intent-based YAML generation being prioritized for the next release cycle.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by defining metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and centering the user experience in every design decision.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ cross-functional teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, translating strategic goals into actionable delivery outcomes.

Drove discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a product roadmap targeting automation of critical paths to reduce operational toil across the modernization program.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with quantitative, data-driven confidence.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by proactively identifying and communicating risks to stakeholders.

Facilitated **Agile ceremonies** including sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retrospectives, resolving 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilizing the developer intake process to meet scope and schedule requirements.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving delivery quality across cross-functional teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that improved operational consistency and customer satisfaction.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels using qualitative and quantitative user feedback.

Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering actionable pricing model recommendations to leadership grounded in business and user needs.
